location: A reward from siding with (or defeating for) Sir Ansbach during his invasion clash with Needle Knight Leda on the first floor of the Specimen Storehouse, Shadow Keep. NOTE: this is Shadow of the Erdtree DLC content — it does not exist in the base game, despite being filed under this project's base/bows.json.
tactics: Flag: this weapon requires the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC and cannot be obtained without it — worth double-checking why it's classified as a base-game weapon in this project's data

Advance both Needle Knight Leda's and Sir Ansbach's questlines in parallel (starting near Main Gate Cross/Highroad Cross) until Leda grows suspicious of Ansbach; retrieve the Secret Rite Scroll in the Specimen Storehouse and hand it to him
Critical fork: if you help the Hornsent defeat Leda earlier in the chain, Leda never invades Ansbach and this reward is lost for that playthrough

When the invasion triggers back at the Storehouse, use the summon sign to fight for Ansbach (or Leda) to claim the bow — this is separate from Ansbach's later, endgame-only reward (Obsidian Lamina at Enir-Ilim)
lore: An unconventional longbow built from two bow-bodies and two strings; despite its longbow classification it can be drawn and fired with a light bow's speed, but only by an archer with truly exceptional dexterity.

builds.name: Extreme Dex bow
builds.why: 43 Dexterity requirement (the highest of any bow) with D scaling, plus the Fan Shot skill firing eight arrows in a spread — built for high-Dex arrow-spam builds
